title: 思い出のときめき 今も My Heartに

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky has recently been appointed an
ambassador for the hotel resort. Today she is
attending a meeting about the renovation
project.

text_block_list.name: Manager
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, with the neighboring hotel recently going
viral online, what should be our counterstrategy?

text_block_list.name: Resort Staff A
text_block_list.text:
The public is looking for something fresh! We
should stop relying on our brand as a historic
wellness resort and rebuild our image from the
ground up!

text_block_list.name: Resort Staff B
text_block_list.text:
Or we could use what's trending on Umastagram
for references? Adding a pop of color to the
lobby could be good.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hm...

text_block_list.name: Manager
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Unfortunately, our budget won't accommodate either... This is starting to appear rather hopeless...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
...Listen up, everyone! I think we've made a good
amount of progress, so how about we take ten?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Let's treat ourselves to a cup of coffee! I know a
good spot nearby!

text_block_list.name: Resort Staff B
text_block_list.text:
Good idea! And if it's a trendy cafe, the desserts
and interior could give us ideas!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hiya, I'm baaack! Could you hook everyone up
with my usual?

text_block_list.name: Resort Staff A
text_block_list.text:
Well, uh... this cafe certainly feels like a time
capsule.

text_block_list.name: Barista
text_block_list.text: Here is your coffee. Feel free to take your time.

text_block_list.name: Resort Staff B
text_block_list.text: Oh, yes, thank you. Don't mind if I do...

text_block_list.name: Resort Staff A
text_block_list.text:
Wow, this coffee is so good! The flavor is smooth,
and it has just the right balance of bitter and
sweet!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Doesn't their cup of java just hit the spot? ♪ The
barista roasted the beans himself!

text_block_list.name: Resort Staff A
text_block_list.text:
It truly is something else, though it's hard to
imagine that these notes are accomplished simply
through the act of roasting the beans yourself. Is
it something about the heat, or perhaps the
humidity?

text_block_list.name: Barista
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, it's all of those factors and more. I also
handpick each and every bean that goes into the
blend.

text_block_list.name: Barista
text_block_list.text:
I'm overjoyed to hear you compliment the flavor.
My beans come directly from an international
supplier.

text_block_list.name: Resort Staff A
text_block_list.text:
I've never had a cup quite like it! I know it sounds
dramatic, but I'm actually moved...

text_block_list.name: Resort Staff B
text_block_list.text: Your attention to detail is honestly astounding!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
...You know, I saw this on TV the other day, but...
apparently cafes like this aren't fashionable
anymore.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I know people are normally attracted to new
things. But, you know what I really think is
important?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You all should know the answer, having
recognized the barista's incredible care and
attention to his coffee brewing.

text_block_list.name: Resort Hotel Staff
text_block_list.text: Oh...

text_block_list.name: Resort Staff A
text_block_list.text:
The answer is to find that spark in your heart, to
draw it out and hone it.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Even if it's old and outdated, whatever makes
your heart race will always be trendy!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: And that includes this very cafe! ♪

text_block_list.name: Resort Staff B
text_block_list.text:
It seems... we lost sight of what was truly
important...

text_block_list.name: Manager
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's recommence our meeting! It's time
to go back to the drawing board and figure out
how to get our customers' hearts racing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, as I'm walking around the academy...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Yoohoo, you over there! A famous seaside resort
has just been renovated! I hope you can make it
to the grand opening!

text_block_list.name: Maruzen's Underclassmen
text_block_list.text:
I'll take one of your flyers, Maruzen!
I'll have one too!
Can I have one, Maruzen?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Thanks a bunch, everyone! This little dance
number will really get things going!

text_block_list.name: Student
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, a resort hotel. It seems like a hidden gem. I
should probably check it out.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, everything's going to plan! Time to take my
advertising up a notch!
